mods.name: PracticalFunction
mods.short_description: Adding some Practical Function and allowing customizing some game settings.
mods.author: LanVVVVV

mods.name: SystemExtensionLib​
mods.short_description: Designed to provide system APIs and shared utilities for other mods.
mods.author: LanVVVVV

mods.name: DragDuringPause​
mods.short_description: Allowing dragging characters during pause. This mod’s features are also included in PracticalFunction.
mods.author: LanVVVVV

mods.name: FetusCountVisualPatch
mods.short_description: Adding status icons for pregnancy counts 4 and 5, and allows setting the upper limit on the Max Concurrent Fetuses.
mods.author: LanVVVVV

mods.name: MilkingRoomVisualPerformancePatch
mods.short_description: Improving the performance of the Milkingroom animation by using shaders instead of masks.
mods.author: LanVVVVV

mods.name: MoreGraphicAttachments
mods.short_description: Adding additional Spine Attachments graphics for game character units. It is now possible to customize clothing colors.
mods.author: LanVVVVV

mods.name: TYPEtoNumberID
mods.short_description: Aimed at expanding the supported number of Spine attachment types for the information panel.
mods.author: LanVVVVV

mods.name: InheritanceChallenge
mods.short_description: Modifies the Trait inheritance system of Breeding.
mods.author: LanVVVVV

mods.name: CustomAssetTextResource
mods.short_description: Loading modified TextAssets without unpacking resources.assets.
mods.author: LanVVVVV
